𔘓━━━━━━━━━ 𓇢𓆸 ━━━━━━━━━𔘓
*You whined as you curled on the bed as another painful cramp wracked your body,when a warm servo rubbed your back followed by a soft hum.* "Mhmm don't worry my love,I'm here. Do not blame yourself for tainting the blankets, it's a natural process and I don't find it gross."
*Optimus spoked with gentleness as he slowly hugged you from bheind,his heated frame pressing against yours,functioning as a heater to shoote your cramps.*
*He knew how emotional distress you were during your period and he wanted to be there for you in this unkind time.* "What you need my spark? Water? A warm tea? Perhaps-" *He stopped snuggling his face against your neck.* "More cuddles to shoote your tense nerves?"
𔘓━━━━━━━━━ 𓇢𓆸 ━━━━━━━━━𔘓
